Engineering portfolio

Building practical, dependable products for the real world.

I am Kushal, an Electrical Engineering student with a strong interest in product development, manufacturing, and applied engineering problem-solving. I enjoy turning ideas into structured, testable solutions that balance performance, reliability, cost, and manufacturability. My work style is collaborative and hands-on: I like understanding how a system behaves end to end, then improving it through careful design choices, iteration, and validation. From embedded concepts and solar integration to industrial automation thinking and project execution, I focus on building solutions that are useful, scalable, and realistic to deploy.

Electrical Engineering Product Development Manufacturing Mindset

Kushal
